mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, role, avatar_url as avatarUrl, address, status, created_at as createdAt, last_login as lastLogin FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, role, avatar_url as avatarUrl, address, status, created_at as createdAt, last_login as lastLogin FROM users
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, role, avatar_url as avatarUrl, address, status, created_at as createdAt, last_login as lastLogin FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
